verses.text: Biakinn-ah na pai ciangin limtakin kingaihsun in. A man leh a manlo a khen theilo mihaite' biakpiaknate tawh a kibang piakna sangin thu ngai dingin biakinn-a paina hoihzaw hi
Thu ngaihsun masa-in pau in la, Pasian' tungah thu mawk ciampak kei in. Vantungah Pasian om a, leitungah nang om na hih manin na pau ding-a kilawm zahval pau kei in
Lunghimawh semsem lecin na mang sia semsem ding a, tam pau semsem lecin na haina kilang semsem ding hi
Pasian' tungah thu na ciam ciangin manlangin tungsak pah in. Amah in mihaite diksalo hi. Na thuciamna bangin tungsak in
Na thuciamna bangin na tun'sak kei ding leh thu ciam vet kei zaw in

Khialkha ing, ci-in Pasian' siampipa' mai-ah na gen ding kisam khading ahih manin na kampauna hangin khialkha kei in. Tua bangin gamta khial lecin nangma tungah Pasian heh ding a, na sepsa khempeuh hong suksiatsak ding hi
Mang tam man leeng a mawkna mah tam a, kam tam pau leeng zong a kituak mahin a mawkna thu mah kibehlap hi; bangbang ahi zongin Pasian zahtak lai veve in.
Kumpite in mizawngte gim ngahsakin, thuman thutangin na a kisep kei leh lamdang sa kei in. Uliante pen amau' tunga uliante in en uh a, tuate' tungah a ensawn a lianzaw khat omlai hi
Gam khat peuhpeuh in lo khawhna lamsang a lunghimawh kumpi khat kisam hi
Sum deihna lungsim na neih leh lungkim hun cih na thei ngei kei ding hi. Na hauhnop hangin na deih khempeuh na ngah ngei kei ding hi. Hih pen a mawknapi ahi hi
Hau semsem lecin na vak ding mi tam semsem a, a hau zaw hi'ng, ci-a na theih bek cih simloh bangmah phattuamna na ngah kei hi
Na a sem mipa pen a nek ding nei ta leh nei ta kei leh lungnuam takin ihmu thei a, a haute ahih leh lungnuam takin ihmu theilo uh hi
A hoih hetlo na khat hih leitungah ka mu hi: Mite amau' lunggimna dingin hau uh hi
Na a sep khialh manun a neihsa teng uh suplawh uh a, a tu a tate' luah ding bangmah om nawnlo hi
I nute' sung panin bangmah neiloin guaktangin i suah mah bangin guaktang mahin i ciahkik hi. I sepsate i ciahpihkik theih bangmah omlo hi
A dahhuai mahmah thu in: I suah hun lai-a mah bang teekteek-in i ciahkik ding hi. A mawknapi ding-a i sepna-ah bang phattuamna ngah ihi hiam
I nuntak sungteng lungzin'na, dahna, lunghihmawhna, natna satna, leh hehna bek tawh hun bei lel hi
Keimah in ka phawkkhiat thu in: Pasian in tomkha nuntak hih leitungah hong piak sungin, i sep thaman ne-in dawnin i om ding a hoihpen ahi hi. Hih pen mihingte' thumong ahi hi
Pasian in mi khat neihlelam guan'in, a hauhna nuamtakin a neksak leh, amah lungdamin a sepna thaman ne-in a om ding hi. Tua nopsakna pen Pasian' kiang pan ahi hi
Pasian in lungdamin omsak ahih manin a nuntak tomlam phawkin nei khalo ding hi.
